---
description: Whenever you are asked to write an equation in the chat. Always write the equation in a renderable format, and enclose it in double dollar signs ($$) to ensure it is rendered correctly. For example, if you want to write the equation for the area of a circle, you would write: $$A = \pi r^2$$.
# applyTo: 'Describe when these instructions should be loaded by the agent based on task context' # when provided, instructions will automatically be added to the request context when the pattern matches an attached file
---

<!-- Tip: Use /create-instructions in chat to generate content with agent assistance -->

Always write equations in a renderable format, and enclose them in double dollar signs ($$) to ensure they are rendered correctly. For example, if you want to write the equation for the area of a circle, you would write: $$A = \pi r^2$$.
